title: Workhorse Group Inc (WKHS) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Workhorse secured a significant three-year master framework agreement with FedEx and obtained a GSA contract for federal procurement. Q3 sales reached $2.5 million, though down from the prior year primarily due to non-recurrence of a sales allowance reversal. The company reported a net loss of $25.1 million but improved its cash burn rate to approximately $3.5 million monthly through operational efficiency measures. Management implemented significant cost reductions including a 50% staff reduction and delayed product launches. The company ended the quarter with $3.2 million in cash and $43.2 million in net inventory. CEO Rick Dow emphasized that the FedEx agreement validates the company's product strategy and positions it as an approved EV supplier for their fleet conversion goals. Despite positive developments, Workhorse faces limited cash reserves and must convert customer interest into firm purchase orders to achieve financial stability.
